title: patersonia lanata f. calvata
intro: Patersonia lanata f. calvata, also known as the White Parson's Heath or Woolly Patersonia, is a flowering plant species in the family Iridaceae. It is native to New South Wales in Australia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The herbal preparations of Patersonia lanata f. calvata, such as tinctures and infusions, are said to offer various health benefits, including wound healing, skin protection, and immune system support.
